## Checklist

- [ ] The PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g. `fix(cli): …`).
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change.
- [ ] `pnpm check:all` and `pnpm test` pass for the workspace(s) I touched.
